title: February 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 23''' is the 54th day of the year. There are 311 days remaining (312 in leap years).</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1921|1921]] – [[Jack Rader]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Kelly Macdonald]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Brian Albert Thies]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Josh Gad]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 88|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 88]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 15|''Star Wars'' (1998) 15]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 29|''Empire'' 29]] published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 22]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Clone Wars Gambit: Stealth]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 2|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 2]] published.
*2011 – [[Legacy—War 3|''Legacy—War'' 3]] published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 59|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 59]] released.
*2011 – [[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 60|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 60]] released.
*[[2013]] – "[[To Catch a Jedi]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – "[[Rebel Resolve]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Tales of the Rebellion]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Rebel Adventures]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The Heroes of Rogue One]]'' published in French.
*[[2022]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 13|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 13]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Tale of Short Spire / The Team Up]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
